worth_reading.title: Agent Runs now available in the Vercel MCP and CLI
worth_reading.author: Vercel AI
worth_reading.summary: Your agent can now inspect Agent Runs via the Vercel MCP and CLI for eve , the open-source agent framework. eve traces are automatically ingested when deployed to Vercel and available as Agent Runs. The new Vercel MCP tools and Vercel CLI commands let you find projects with runs, list recent runs, and retrieve full traces, including reasoning, tool calls, and token usage. Vercel MCP tools: list_agent_run_projects : Find projects in a team with Agent Runs activity. list_agent_
worth_reading.excerpt: Your agent can now inspect Agent Runs via the Vercel MCP and CLI for eve , the open-source agent framework. eve traces are automatically ingested when deployed to Vercel and available as Agent Runs. The new Vercel MCP tools and Vercel CLI commands let you find projects with runs, list recent runs, and retrieve full traces, including reasoning, tool calls, and token usage. Vercel MCP tools: list_agent_run_projects : Find projects in a team with Agent Runs activity. list_agent_
worth_reading.reason_selected: 当日新抓取且未展示过：Agent Runs now available in the Vercel MCP and CLI 来自 Vercel AI 的公开抓取入口，证据链保留原始链接与抓取来源。

clusters.title: Agent Runs now available in the Vercel MCP and CLI
clusters.summary: Your agent can now inspect Agent Runs via the Vercel MCP and CLI for eve , the open-source agent framework. eve traces are automatically ingested when deployed to Vercel and available as Agent Runs. The new Vercel MCP tools and Vercel CLI commands let you find projects with runs, list recent runs, and retrieve full traces, including reasoning, tool calls, and token usage. Vercel MCP tools: list_agent_run_projects : Find projects in a team with Agent Runs activity. list_agent_
